howItWorks.intro: This screen time cost calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Opportunity Cost = Daily Hours × 365 × Hourly Rate
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much screen time is normal?
faq.answer: US adults average 7+ hours of daily screen time (including work). Non-work screen time averages 3-5 hours. This has increased 50% since 2020.

faq.question: Why does screen time matter?
faq.answer: Excessive screen time is linked to poor sleep, eye strain, neck/back pain, reduced attention span, increased anxiety and depression, and reduced physical activity.

faq.question: What is a healthy amount?
faq.answer: The American Academy of Pediatrics recommends under 2 hours for children. For adults, reducing non-work screen time to 2-3 hours and taking regular breaks is beneficial.

faq.question: How can I reduce screen time?
faq.answer: Use built-in screen time trackers, set app limits, enable grayscale mode, create phone-free zones (bedroom, dinner table), and find offline hobbies to replace scrolling.

faq.question: Is the Screen Time Cost Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Screen Time Cost Calculator?
sections.body: The Screen Time Cost Calculator is a free online tool designed for individuals seeking balance who need quick, accurate calculations in the mental health and wellness space. By entering your daily screen hours, your hourly rate, you get instant results including weekly screen time, yearly screen time, yearly opportunity cost. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting weekly screen time right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In mental health and wellness, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by individuals seeking balance worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to support your mental well-being with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your daily screen hours and need to find the right weekly screen time. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
